$comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the Fire Editor wire protocol. Both editor/fire_editor/_generated.py and editor/extension/src/protocol/generated.ts are produced from this file by codegen.py. Never hand-edit the generated files. Bump protocol_version on ANY incompatible change and regenerate both bindings in the same commit (EDITOR_PRD hard rule 6).

hello.doc: Handshake. Client announces its protocol_version; daemon rejects on mismatch.

world.open.doc: Open a world by seed or save file. Resets the editor session. Exactly one of seed/save_path.

world.save.doc: Save the current editor session to a .ta save file (terrain deltas).

chunks.set_center.doc: Set the editor camera center; daemon streams chunk meshes (binary MESH frames) for the surrounding region and unloads far chunks.

terrain.raycast.doc: Cast a ray through the voxel field; returns the first solid hit or null.

log.doc: Daemon -> client log line, surfaced in the extension output channel.

chunk.ready.doc: A MESH binary frame (payload_id) for chunk (cx,cy,cz) is being sent.

chunk.unload.doc: Chunk (cx,cy,cz) left the streamed region; client should drop its geometry.
